result:
## Summary

**Root cause**: The `preferences_backup_limits.xml` file was not registered in the search index in `HeaderFragment.configureSearchBar()`. All other preference screens (General, Reviewing, Sync, Notifications, Appearance, Controls, Accessibility, etc.) were indexed for search, but Backups was missing.

**Fix**: Added `index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)` to the search configuration in `HeaderFragment.kt:127`. This is a one-line change.

The fragment mapping in `Preferences.getFragmentFromXmlRes()` already correctly maps `R.xml.preferences_backup_limits` to `BackupLimitsSettingsFragment()`, so the search result navigation will work correctly once the index entry is added.

**File changed**: `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/HeaderFragment.kt` — added line 127: `index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)`
